ExtensionMethods Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The ExtensionMethods type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
IsSecureOrForwarded
Returns a flag indicating if the IsHttps property is set, or if the X-Forwarded-Proto header indicates that the connection is secure from the client's perspective.
